message:
Bypass cell-slot cache for fused row scans

Use an uncached current-cell parse for rowid_and_payload_into, which consumes rowid and payload once before advancing. Seek/probe and other repeated-access paths continue using the cursor cell-slot cache.

Mixed OLTP quick benchmark after fused cursor baseline: 1057/1079 ms; after this change: 486.21/479.36 ms.
